resources.string: This action cannot be authorized because the permission document is invalid. Please contact support to refresh your authorization.
This action cannot be authorized because the permission document has expired. Please renew your authorization and try again.
This action is not permitted by your current authorization level.
This action was blocked because it would exceed the allowed resource boundaries.
This action is not permitted while the vehicle is in its current state. Please ensure the vehicle is safely stopped before retrying.
This action involves a safety-critical vehicle system and cannot be performed by an automated assistant under any circumstances.
This action involves protected personal data and cannot be performed automatically. Please use the manual controls.
This action is not available at the current time or in the current location.
Too many requests have been made recently. Please wait a moment and try again.
This authorization has been revoked. Please contact your administrator.
The authorization document was issued by an unrecognized authority. Please contact support.
The request was not valid. Please check the action parameters and try again.
Access to this information requires an additional privacy authorization that is not present in your current permission document.
An internal error occurred while checking authorization. Please try again. If the problem persists, contact support.
This action was denied for an unspecified reason. Please contact support.
This action requires approval from a human operator before it can proceed. A request has been sent.
